description: A telecommunications company needs to identify gaps in their network coverage using Oracle Spatial. Using the EXISTING_TOWERS and PROPOSED_SITES tables in the HR schema, convert the existing latitude/longitude data into SDO_GEOMETRY columns named GEO_LOCATION using SRID 4326. Register both tables in USER_SDO_GEOM_METADATA with bounds of -180 to 180 for longitude and -90 to 90 for latitude and a tolerance of 0.05 meters, then create spatial indexes on the new columns. Identify 'unserviced' PROPOSED_SITES that are more than 25 kilometers away from all EXISTING_TOWERS. Export the SITE_NAME and STATE of these unserviced sites, sorted alphabetically by Site Name, to /home/ga/Desktop/priority_expansion_sites.txt.
